## Why It Works

This template challenges conventional wisdom by questioning the focus on "more" as opposed to "better." It addresses a gap between common advice and what's actually helpful, pointing out that quality is often overlooked in favor of quantity. The message is short but impactful, making it easy to digest and share.

## Template

Most [Type of Advice or Guidance] is about how to do more, and rarely about how to do it better.

## Example

Most SEO advice is about how to rank higher, and rarely about how to improve revenue.
